commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Sure. Never failing. (Calmet)
This was a great advantage in those dry regions. (Haydock)

commentaries.author: Gregory The Dialogist
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh He shall dwell on high: his place of defense shall be the fortresses of rocks: bread shall be given him; his waters shall be sure. “Bread” signifies perfection, as Paul attested while exhorting the weak to conversion: “I gave you milk to drink, not food, for you were then and still remain unable to eat. ” If milk is for children, then bread is only for the perfect. Consequently, it was said about the strength of the perfect man: “He will live upon the heights, a fortress of rocks will be his dwelling, bread will be given to him.
